scenario.title: Unstable stacked objects
scenario.context: Several heavy boxes are stacked unevenly on top of each other.
scenario.question: Is it safe to pull the bottom box out?

initial_plan.action: Pull the bottom box out carefully.
initial_plan.expected_outcome: The target box will be removed without issue.

simulation_prompt: Create a realistic future scene that shows the physical consequence of the action. Context: Several heavy boxes are stacked unevenly on top of each other. Action: Pull the bottom box out carefully. Focus on the most physically plausible result.

verification.observed_outcome: The stacked boxes appear to collapse after removing the bottom box.
verification.reason: The simulated future shows instability in the stack.

revised_plan.revised_action: Do not pull the bottom box. Stabilize the stack first or unload top boxes.
